name: Diclofenac And Paracetamol Tablets
about: These Diclofenac And Paracetamol Tablets are a combination of two commonly used medications for pain relief and inflammation. Each tablet contains a specific dosage of Diclofenac and Paracetamol, which are known for their effectiveness in reducing pain and fever. The tablets come in a convenient dosage form and are suitable for general medicinal use. Manufactured in India, these tablets are packed in boxes of 50x10 tablets and should be stored in a dry and cool place. It is recommended to take these tablets as per the guidelines provided by a doctor for optimal results.
